languages.text: {n}Зарковцы сначала отнеслись к идеям ксеноса с недоверим, но вскоре смогли оценить их сполна. На подступах к поселениям появились особые ловушки для Погонщиц, которые запутывали и ранили тварей, позволяя расправляться с ними почти без потерь. Постепенно основная масса популяции Погонщиц был отловлена и уничтожена.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Зарковцы сначала отнеслись к идеям ксеноса с недоверим, но вскоре смогли оценить их сполна. На подступах к поселениям появились особые ловушки для Погонщиц, которые запутывали и ранили тварей, позволяя расправляться с ними почти без потерь. Постепенно основная масса популяции Погонщиц был отловлена и уничтожена.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The Zarkovians were at first suspicious of the xenos's suggestions, yet they soon came to fully appreciate them. Specialised traps for the Drovers appeared on the approaches to the settlements, ensnaring and wounding the creatures and allowing the defenders to dispatch them with minimal losses. Gradually, the bulk of the Drover population was captured and destroyed.{/n}

Постепенно основная масса популяции Погонщиц был отловлена и уничтожена.{/n}

Gradually, the bulk of the Drover population was captured and destroyed.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zarkovlular, zenonun önerilerine başlarda şüpheyle yaklaştılar ancak çok geçmeden bunların değerini tam olarak anladılar. Çobanlar için özel tuzaklar; yerleşim yerlerinin yaklaşımlarında ortaya çıktı, yaratıkları tuzağa düşürüp yaralayarak savunucuların onları en az kayıpla ortadan kaldırmasına olanak tanıdı. Yavaş yavaş Çoban nüfusunun büyük bir kısmı yakalandı ve yok edildi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Zarkovians were at first suspicious of the xenos's suggestions, yet they soon came to fully appreciate them. Specialised traps for the Drovers appeared on the approaches to the settlements, ensnaring and wounding the creatures and allowing the defenders to dispatch them with minimal losses. Gradually, the bulk of the Drover population was captured and destroyed.{/n}

Çobanlar için özel tuzaklar; yerleşim yerlerinin yaklaşımlarında ortaya çıktı, yaratıkları tuzağa düşürüp yaralayarak savunucuların onları en az kayıpla ortadan kaldırmasına olanak tanıdı. Yavaş yavaş Çoban nüfusunun büyük bir kısmı yakalandı ve yok edildi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Zarkoviens furent d'abord méfiants à l'égard des suggestions des xénos, mais apprirent bien vite à les apprécier à leur juste valeur. Des pièges spécialement destinés aux Chasseurs fleurirent en bordure des villages, capturant et estropiant les créatures, et permettant aux gardes de les éliminer sans qu'il y ait trop de victimes. Au fil du temps, la population de Chasseurs fut en grande partie capturée et décimée.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Zarkovians were at first suspicious of the xenos's suggestions, yet they soon came to fully appreciate them. Specialised traps for the Drovers appeared on the approaches to the settlements, ensnaring and wounding the creatures and allowing the defenders to dispatch them with minimal losses. Gradually, the bulk of the Drover population was captured and destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les Zarkoviens furent d'abord méfiants à l'égard des suggestions des xénos, mais apprirent bien vite à les apprécier à leur juste valeur. Des pièges spécialement destinés aux Chasseurs fleurirent en bordure des villages, capturant et estropiant les créatures, et permettant aux gardes de les éliminer sans qu'il y ait trop de victimes. Au fil du temps, la population de Chasseurs fut en grande partie capturée et décimée.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Al principio, los zarkovianos sospechaban de las sugerencias de la xenos, pero pronto aprendieron a valorarlas como merecían. Aparecieron trampas especializadas para los Pastores en el camino a los asentamientos, capaces de inmovilizar y herir a las criaturas para que los defensores pudieran eliminarlas con un mínimo de pérdidas. Poco a poco, la mayor parte de los Pastores acabó capturada y destruida.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Zarkovians were at first suspicious of the xenos's suggestions, yet they soon came to fully appreciate them. Specialised traps for the Drovers appeared on the approaches to the settlements, ensnaring and wounding the creatures and allowing the defenders to dispatch them with minimal losses. Gradually, the bulk of the Drover population was captured and destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Al principio, los zarkovianos sospechaban de las sugerencias de la xenos, pero pronto aprendieron a valorarlas como merecían. Aparecieron trampas especializadas para los Pastores en el camino a los asentamientos, capaces de inmovilizar y herir a las criaturas para que los defensores pudieran eliminarlas con un mínimo de pérdidas. Poco a poco, la mayor parte de los Pastores acabó capturada y destruida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}起初，扎尔科夫人对这名异形提出的建议心存犹疑，但他们很快便充分认识到了其中价值。通往各处定居点的要道上陆续布设了专门针对拒生花的陷阱。这些陷阱能困住并重创这些怪物，使守军能够以极小的伤亡将其消灭。随着时间推移，绝大多数拒生花都被捕获并清剿。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Zarkovians were at first suspicious of the xenos's suggestions, yet they soon came to fully appreciate them. Specialised traps for the Drovers appeared on the approaches to the settlements, ensnaring and wounding the creatures and allowing the defenders to dispatch them with minimal losses. Gradually, the bulk of the Drover population was captured and destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}起初，扎尔科夫人对这名异形提出的建议心存犹疑，但他们很快便充分认识到了其中价值。通往各处定居点的要道上陆续布设了专门针对拒生花的陷阱。这些陷阱能困住并重创这些怪物，使守军能够以极小的伤亡将其消灭。随着时间推移，绝大多数拒生花都被捕获并清剿。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Zarkovianer waren angesichts der Vorschläge der Xenos zunächst misstrauisch, wussten sie aber schon bald zu schätzen. Im Umfeld der Siedlungen entstanden spezialisierte Treiberfallen, die die Kreaturen fingen und verletzten, damit sie die Verteidiger mit minimalen Verlusten töten konnten. Nach und nach wurde ein Großteil der Treiber gefangen und vernichtet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Zarkovians were at first suspicious of the xenos's suggestions, yet they soon came to fully appreciate them. Specialised traps for the Drovers appeared on the approaches to the settlements, ensnaring and wounding the creatures and allowing the defenders to dispatch them with minimal losses. Gradually, the bulk of the Drover population was captured and destroyed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Zarkovianer waren angesichts der Vorschläge der Xenos zunächst misstrauisch, wussten sie aber schon bald zu schätzen. Im Umfeld der Siedlungen entstanden spezialisierte Treiberfallen, die die Kreaturen fingen und verletzten, damit sie die Verteidiger mit minimalen Verlusten töten konnten. Nach und nach wurde ein Großteil der Treiber gefangen und vernichtet.{/n}
